title: Conversation Event
description: Conversation Event data including agentic information, prompt, response, feedback an associated metadata.

xdm:eventType.title: Event Type
xdm:eventType.description: The primary event type for this time-series record.

xdm:conversation.title: Conversation
xdm:conversation.description: Object representing a conversation that includes prompt, response, and feedback with associated metadata

xdm:conversationID.title: Conversation ID
xdm:conversationID.description: ID to group several turns together

xdm:conversationName.title: Conversation Name
xdm:conversationName.description: Name given to a conversation representing it's overall context

xdm:turnID.title: Turn ID
xdm:turnID.description: A single instance of a prompt, response, and feedback

xdm:signals.title: Conversation Signals
xdm:signals.description: Signals based on this event and the conversation to date

xdm:scope.title: Scope
xdm:scope.description: Scope of inputs from which this set of signals is derived.

xdm:attributes.title: Attributes
xdm:attributes.description: (DEPRECATED — use xdm:attributesMap) The set of derived signals for this scope. Superseded by xdm:attributesMap, which models signals as an extensible map keyed by signal id.

items.description: Subjects and qualifiers of the scoped input, similar to keywords but more meaningful

xdm:phrase.title: Phrase
xdm:phrase.description: A phrase or keyword extracted from the scoped input

items.title: Phrase Qualifiers
items.description: List of qualifiers for the scoped input

items.title: Intent Values
items.description: Intents derived from the scoped input

items.title: Tone Values
items.description: Tones derived from the scoped input

xdm:value.title: Sentiment Value
xdm:value.description: Score from -1 (meaning negative) to 1 (indicating positive) to indicate sentiment

xdm:attributesMap.title: Signal Attributes Map
xdm:attributesMap.description: Map of signal id to signal value. The key is the signal identifier (for example 'subjects', 'intents', 'tones', 'sentiment', or any producer-defined signal). Supersedes xdm:attributes; new signal types require no schema change.

additionalProperties.title: Conversation Signal
additionalProperties.description: A single derived conversation signal. The xdm:type discriminator indicates which typed value field (xdm:stringValue, xdm:numberValue, or xdm:booleanValue) is populated on each entry of xdm:values.

xdm:type.title: Signal Value Type
xdm:type.description: Data type of this signal's values; tells consumers which typed value field is populated on each entry of xdm:values.

meta:enum.string: Values carry xdm:stringValue (e.g. an intent, tone, or extracted phrase)
meta:enum.number: Values carry xdm:numberValue (e.g. a sentiment score or intensity)

xdm:values.title: Signal Values
xdm:values.description: One or more values for this signal.

xdm:stringValue.title: String Value
xdm:stringValue.description: Populated when xdm:type is 'string'. A categorical value such as an intent, tone, or extracted phrase.

xdm:numberValue.title: Number Value
xdm:numberValue.description: Populated when xdm:type is 'number'. For example a sentiment score from -1 to 1, or an intensity.

xdm:booleanValue.title: Boolean Value
xdm:booleanValue.description: Populated when xdm:type is 'boolean'. A true or false flag.

xdm:confidence.title: Confidence
xdm:confidence.description: Confidence the producer assigns to this value, from 0 to 1.

xdm:qualifiers.title: Qualifiers
xdm:qualifiers.description: Additional descriptors for this value, similar to keywords but more meaningful.

xdm:metadata.title: Metadata
xdm:metadata.description: Producer-defined metadata for this value as a map of string key to string value (for example the context around a signal value).

additionalProperties.title: Metadata Value
additionalProperties.description: Metadata value for the associated key.

xdm:raw.title: Raw Text and Purpose
xdm:raw.description: Raw text with purpose of the text

xdm:purpose.title: Prompt Purpose
xdm:purpose.description: Purpose of the prompt data. Users may input multiple things simultaneously such as text and a link or attachment.

xdm:raw.title: Raw Text and Purpose
xdm:raw.description: Raw text with purpose of the text

xdm:purpose.title: Response Purpose
xdm:purpose.description: Purpose of the response data. Agents may respond with multiple things simultaneously such as text, video, links, pictures, etc.

xdm:raw.title: Raw Text and Purpose
xdm:raw.description: Raw text with purpose of the text

xdm:purpose.title: Feedback Purpose
xdm:purpose.description: Purpose of the feedback data. Users may input multiple things simultaneously such as text, screenshot, links, attachments, etc.

xdm:score.title: Feedback Rating Score
xdm:score.description: Numerical value of the rating provided by the end-user ranging from -1.0 (negative) to 1.0 (positive).

xdm:classification.title: Feedback Rating Classification
xdm:classification.description: String/enum value of the rating provided by the end-user.

xdm:reasons.title: Feedback Rating Reasons
xdm:reasons.description: Canned reasons why the customer provided this rating usually presented as a set of checkboxes.
